questions.question: Explain lexical ambiguity with a suitable example. Why does it pose a challenge for POS tagging?
expectedPoints: Clear example of a word with multiple POS tags (e.g., 'back', 'light')
Explanation of how context is needed to resolve the ambiguity
Mention that this is the fundamental problem POS taggers solve

questions.question: Describe the Hidden Markov Model (HMM) approach to POS tagging. Your answer should include the two core probabilities and the role of the Viterbi algorithm.
expectedPoints: Brief introduction to HMM as a probabilistic sequence model
Definition and example of Transition Probability (P(tag_i | tag_{i-1}))
Definition and example of Emission Probability (P(word | tag))
Statement of the goal: finding the most probable tag sequence
Explanation of the Viterbi algorithm as an efficient dynamic programming solution for this goal
Optional: Simple diagrammatic representation of the model
